title: Probiotic Evidence Limits
script_summary: Explores the limits of probiotic evidence through scientific insights.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about probiotic evidence limits.
Probiotics are often hailed as miracle workers for gut health.
But research shows the evidence is... mixed.
Some studies report benefits, while others find minimal effects.
And here's the kicker: many claims are based on preliminary research!
So, before jumping on the probiotic bandwagon, do your homework.
Hit follow for more science insights!
